projectDescription: A terminal-based spreadsheet tool with vim-style keybindings for editing CSV and TSV files in your terminal.
keyFeatures: Interactive TUI spreadsheet editor in the terminal
Vim-style keybindings for navigation and editing
Formula support with SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, COUNT functions
Cell range queries and assignments from the command line
Visual selection mode with formula insertion
Search forward and backward with marks and jump list
publicApiSurface: sheets [file.csv] [cell] — Query a cell value (e.g. B9)
sheets [file.csv] [cell=value] — Set a cell value (e.g. B7=10)
sheets < input.csv — Load CSV from stdin
